case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC VS. KEVIN CORONEL ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORONEL, KEVIN $3,285.69 PRINCIPAL, $258.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,544.64, SEE SCANNED DOC
